2606.26718.title: A Latent ODE Approach to Spatiotemporal Modeling of Cine Cardiac MRI
2606.26718.paper_summary: Cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMR) captures rich spatiotemporal information about ventricular structure and motion, but conventional risk models use only a few image-derived indices from selected cardiac phases. We present a latent dynamical model that encodes bi-ventricular anatomy and full-cycle cine motion as a continuous latent trajectory, using heart-rate-aware neural ordinary differential equation (ODE) dynamics and a graph-based mesh autoencoder to reconstruct anatomically consistent 3D+t ventricular motion. A covariate-conditioned prior defines the expected end-diastolic latent state, and a Cox proportional hazards model tests whether deviations from this prior predict incident heart failure. We studied 72,386 UK Biobank participants without baseline cardiovascular disease, including 367 incident heart failure events. In a held-out evaluation subset, adding the latent score to refitted pooled cohort equations improved the stratified C-index from 0.704 to 0.785, compared with 0.764 for seven established cardiac markers. Compared with non-graph and non-ODE approaches, the proposed model gave the best trade-off between reconstruction fidelity, generative realism, and downstream prognostic performance. These results suggest that continuous full-cycle modeling of ventricular motion provides informative cardiac phenotypes beyond conventional CMR summaries, while external validation in more representative patient cohorts is required before clinical risk-prediction use.
2606.26718.paper_summary_zh: 心臟磁共振成像 (CMR) 捕捉了豐富的時空信息，關於心室結構和運動，但傳統的風險模型僅使用來自選定心臟相位的少數影像衍生指標。我們提出了一個潛在動態模型，將雙心室解剖和全週期心臟運動編碼為連續的潛在軌跡，使用考慮心率的神經常微分方程 (ODE) 動力學和基於圖形的網格自編碼器來重建解剖一致的 3D+t 心室運動。一個條件協變量的先驗定義了預期的舒張末期潛在狀態，而 Cox 比例風險模型測試從這個先驗的偏差是否預測事件性心力衰竭。我們研究了 72,386 名沒有基線心血管疾病的英國生物銀行參與者，包括 367 例事件性心力衰竭。在一個保留的評估子集上，將潛在分數添加到重新擬合的合併隊列方程中，將分層 C 指數從 0.704 提高到 0.785，而七個已建立的心臟標記的 C 指數為 0.764。與非圖形和非 ODE 方法相比，所提出的模型在重建真實性、生成現實性和下游預後性能之間提供了最佳的權衡。這些結果表明，心室運動的連續全週期建模提供了超越傳統 CMR 總結的信息性心臟表型，但在臨床風險預測使用之前，需要在更具代表性的患者隊列中進行外部驗證。
2606.26718.author: David Brüggemann et.al.
2606.26718.authors: David Brüggemann, Ekaterina Krymova, Firat Özdemir, Jochen von Spiczak, Sebastian Kozerke, Samia Mora, Robert Manka, Mathieu Salzmann, Olga V. Demler
